title: Release misalignment, allow perfect connections
subtitle: A release-and-allow practice for clearing the pattern of accepting work that doesn't fit.
excerpt: A short energy statement from the MONEY program. The release names the habit of settling for misaligned clients; the allow opens to easy, high-value connections.
sourceNotes: Adapted from Day 46 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025). Release/allow structure from The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024).

practice.whenToUse: Use when you have a decision to make about whether to accept a piece of work or a partnership that doesn't feel right.

content.text: A short energy statement for the moment before accepting work that doesn't feel like the right fit. Two statements: one to release the scarcity pull, one to name what you're opening to.
I am ready to release all fear that perfect clients and partners won't appear, that keeps me accepting misaligned work. I release it now. I release it now. I release it now.
I am ready to align with and allow the right clients, partners, and collaborators to find me easily and perfectly. I allow it now. I allow it now. I allow it now.
Say each three times, slow, out loud or in your mind.
Drawn from Day 46 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025). Release/allow structure from The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024).
